---
title: "Gallery"
---

Every figure in this gallery renders at build time from an editable,
version-controlled source — no exported images anywhere in the repo.
Each page shows one format family, with a **view source** link under
every figure and click-to-zoom throughout.

- [Excalidraw](excalidraw.qmd) — hand-drawn diagrams
- [Vega-Lite & Vega](vega.qmd) — charts and force-directed graphs
- [Graphviz & DBML](graphviz.qmd) — graph layouts and database schemas
- [nomnoml](nomnoml.qmd) — node-edge and UML diagrams from terse text
- [WaveDrom](wavedrom.qmd) — timing and register diagrams
- [bytefield](bytefield.qmd) — byte and packet layouts
- [PlantUML](plantuml.qmd) — UML via a kroki endpoint
- [More kroki formats](kroki.qmd) — D2, C4, ditaa, TikZ …

All formats were chosen for **agent fluency**: plain text or JSON that AI
coding agents author and edit reliably. Every figure here was written by
an agent.
